extraction.one_line_summary: WILLIAMS Stephen won a reduced sprint after the breakaway was caught inside 5km, taking his first WorldTour victory on a selective lumpy finale.
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange controlled for Matthews but couldn't prevent race from becoming too selective for pure sprinters like Sagan/Kristoff.
Ineos riders Porte/Fuglsang attacked before final uncategorized rise, forcing splits but couldn't hold off Williams' finishing speed.
Van Wilder leadout for Bahrain allowed Crom to position perfectly center, but Williams emerged from left to surprise.

rider_signals.WILLIAMS Stephen: positive: first WorldTour win shows he can survive selective climbs and still sprint against GC-type riders
rider_signals.SHACHMAN Max: positive: strong second place suggests he's carrying form into Tour de France preparations
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: dropped on final uncategorized climb before finish, worrying sign for stage race ambitions
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Daniel Felipe: negative: distanced on final rise despite being expected GC contender
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: positioned well in finale, showing good form after illness earlier in season
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: BikeExchange's chase work failed as their sprinter couldn't survive the hills
rider_signals.VAN WILDER Ilan: positive: tactical maturity leading out on selective finish shows Bahrain's team cohesion
